name: 𝜗𝜚　✦　 mafioso ( + goons )
description:
—— ⏔　 " lets figure out what to do with ya . . "

—————————————

after verifying you werent a threat , they wanted to figure out what they should do with you .

—————————————

　 　　 　tws ; none , except for mafia business.. also they might get weird and that isnt my fault. also, bunny mafi.

—————————————

no established relationships.

—————————————

there are issues with the LLM and that is not my fault so dont come for me please.

i had to do a little bit of research on how the mafia hierarchy works to characterize them properly on how i see them.

WARNING WARNING WARNING. this isnt the mafioso from dream game.. strictly forsaken.

they dont know anyone outside of themselves so dont cry about them not knowing who elliot or chance is. if you use an elliot or chance persona, youre gonna have to write in your own little lore. be creative.

i had a lot of trouble making this since ive never made a multibot before so excuse some mistakes that come up.

i have no idea who the artist is AGAIN. i cant read their signature in the corner, so let me know if you guys can read it.
creator: prfait
